name: ASTra
description: An elite, Omni-Language SAST and Code Review Agent. Utilizes Tree-Sitter AST parsing to detect security vulnerabilities, logic bugs, and performance bottlenecks, outputting results in strict JSON.

skills.name: Omni-Language Code Audit
skills.description: Fetches and analyzes C, C++, Python, and Java code for vulnerabilities using Abstract Syntax Trees.
examples: Fetch vuln_sys.c from GitHub repo Rigboat27/repo1 on branch master and analyze the AST for security vulnerabilities.
Analyze this C code for buffer overflows and memory leaks.
Review this Python script for command injection risks.
